name: Strawberry Cream Tart
recipeIngredient: 200 g almond biscuits such as macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the almond biscuits and 50g of the amaretti or ratafia biscuits in a polythene bag or using a food processor. Melt the butter in a pan, then add the crushed biscuits and stir until combined. Press into the base and up the sides of a 23cm/9in loose-base flan tin, about 4cm/1 ½ inches deep.
2. Dissolve the jelly packet in 300ml boiling water. Blend the strawberries in a food processor until smooth. Mix with the dissolved jelly and apple juice until the mixture is on the point of setting. Pour into the flan case and chill until set.
3. Roughly crush the remaining biscuits and meringue, and slice the leftover strawberries. Whip the cream until stiff peaks form, then fold in the strawberries, biscuits, and meringue. Pile over the tart and sprinkle with any additional biscuit crumbs. Chill the tart until ready to serve. Remove from the tin before serving.
